channel.title: Code_scanning_upload on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Code_scanning_upload on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Deprecation notice: code_scanning_upload field will be removed from rate_limit API endpoint
item.description:
GitHub will remove the code_scanning_upload field from the rate_limit REST API endpoint response on May 19, 2026. The notice says the field is being deprecated and will no longer be returned after that date.

  • Source: GitHub
